field.label: Flush dependent page cache after new product creation
field.tooltip: If enabled, the extension will regenerate rules and flush FPC cache for dependent pages for new products (once per hour)

field.label: Apply labels for child products of configurable products
field.comment:
If enabled, the extension will assign labels for child products of configurable products.
Labels will be updated after swatch option(s) are selected for configurable products.
Products filtered by the swatch attribute will display labels for corresponding child products.
Enabling this option will increase the reindex time of the Product Label Index.
Reindex the Product Label Index after changing this setting.

field.label: Apply labels for configurable products if one of the child products meets the conditions
Discount output precision
field.tooltip: Number of digits displayed after the decimal point for product discount variable in labels

field.label: Date format
field.tooltip: If not empty, will format attributes with "Date" and "Date and Time" catalog input types
